testcase.name: test_get_assets

error.message: failed on setup with "requests.exceptions.ConnectionError: HTTPConnectionPool(host='127.0.0.1', port=8000): Max retries exceeded with url: /api/auth/login (Caused by NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='127.0.0.1', port=8000): Failed to establish a new connection: [WinError 10061] 由于目标计算机积极拒绝，无法连接。"))"

testcase.error:
C:\Users\FGY\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\connection.py:204: in _new_conn sock = connection.create_connection( C:\Users\FGY\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\util\connection.py:85: in create_connection raise err C:\Users\FGY\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\util\connection.py:73: in create_connection sock.connect(sa) E ConnectionRefusedError: [WinError 10061] 由于目标计算机积极拒绝，无法连接。
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: C:\Users\FGY\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\connectionpool.py:787: in urlopen response = self._make_request( C:\Users\FGY\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\connectionpool.py:493: in _make_request conn.request( C:\Users\FGY\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\connection.py:500: in request self.endheaders() C:\Users\FGY\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\Lib\http\client.py:1353: in endheaders self._send_output(message_body, encode_chunked=encode_chunked) C:\Users\FGY\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\Lib\http\client.py:1113: in _send_output self.send(msg) C:\Users\FGY\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\Lib\http\client.py:1057: in send self.connect() C:\Users\FGY\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\connection.py:331: in connect self.sock = self._new_conn() C:\Users\FGY\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\connection.py:219: in _new_conn raise NewConnectionError( E urllib3.exceptions.NewConnectionError: HTTPConnection(host='127.0.0.1', port=8000): Failed to establish a new connection: [WinError 10061] 由于目标计算机积极拒绝，无法连接。
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: C:\Users\FGY\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\Lib\site-packages\requests\adapters.py:486: in send resp = conn.urlopen( C:\Users\FGY\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\connectionpool.py:841: in urlopen retries = retries.increment( C:\Users\FGY\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\util\retry.py:535: in increment raise MaxRetryError(_pool, url, reason) from reason # type: ignore[arg-type] E urllib3.exceptions.MaxRetryError: HTTPConnectionPool(host='127.0.0.1', port=8000): Max retries exceeded with url: /api/auth/login (Caused by NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='127.0.0.1', port=8000): Failed to establish a new connection: [WinError 10061] 由于目标计算机积极拒绝，无法连接。"))
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: tests\conftest.py:29: in admin_token resp = api_client.login(cfg.username, cfg.password) tests\common\api_client.py:114: in login result = self.post(API.AUTH_LOGIN, json={ tests\common\api_client.py:90: in post return self.request("POST", url, json=json or {}) tests\common\api_client.py:61: in request response = self.session.request( C:\Users\FGY\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\Lib\site-packages\requests\sessions.py:589: in request resp = self.send(prep, **send_kwargs) C:\Users\FGY\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\Lib\site-packages\requests\sessions.py:703: in send r = adapter.send(request, **kwargs) C:\Users\FGY\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\Lib\site-packages\requests\adapters.py:519: in send raise ConnectionError(e, request=request) E requests.exceptions.ConnectionError: HTTPConnectionPool(host='127.0.0.1', port=8000): Max retries exceeded with url: /api/auth/login (Caused by NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='127.0.0.1', port=8000): Failed to establish a new connection: [WinError 10061] 由于目标计算机积极拒绝，无法连接。"))

During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: tests\conftest.py:29: in admin_token resp = api_client.login(cfg.username, cfg.password) tests\common\api_client.py:114: in login result = self.post(API.AUTH_LOGIN, json={ tests\common\api_client.py:90: in post return self.request("POST", url, json=json or {}) tests\common\api_client.py:61: in request response = self.session.request( C:\Users\FGY\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\Lib\site-packages\requests\sessions.py:589: in request resp = self.send(prep, **send_kwargs) C:\Users\FGY\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\Lib\site-packages\requests\sessions.py:703: in send r = adapter.send(request, **kwargs) C:\Users\FGY\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\Lib\site-packages\requests\adapters.py:519: in send raise ConnectionError(e, request=request) E requests.exceptions.ConnectionError: HTTPConnectionPool(host='127.0.0.1', port=8000): Max retries exceeded with url: /api/auth/login (Caused by NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='127.0.0.1', port=8000): Failed to establish a new connection: [WinError 10061] 由于目标计算机积极拒绝，无法连接。"))
